response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~14 years of hands-on experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategic leadership — none of which are clearly evidenced. The resume reflects senior IC delivery work, not principal/strategy-level AI leadership.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
Demonstrated knowledge sharing via talks, workshops, and open source
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Lacks principal/strategy-level leadership and customer-advisory experience
Cloud experience is limited (some AWS CDK); no deep cloud-platform strategy track record

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
No principal/director-level strategy or customer-advisory experience
Recent MCP and AI-agent tooling work at re:cinq
